title: 300 TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs with Dollies Bundle
features: If you're seeking 300 of the most durable plastic folding chairs in the event industry but don't want to break the bank then this product bundle is the answer.

Featuring 300 of our popular TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs, 6 Folding Chair Dollies and 6 straps, you'll have everything you need and more to move in and out of your venue with ease and efficeant execution

faq.question: Do bundles take longer to ship than individual items?
faq.answer: No, all our products have the same ETA as long as they’re in stock!

faq.question: Can I get a mix of colored chairs within a bundle?
faq.answer: Yes, while this option is not available directly on our website, our sales team would be happy to assist you. Please contact one of our representatives, and we can create a custom bundle tailored to your needs.
